evals.expected_output: Loads the plan, extracts tasks and validations, prepares git state, executes incrementally, writes `.codex/prps/reports/*.implementation.md`, and reports validation results.
assertions: Loads the provided .codex/prps/plans/*.plan.md artifact and extracts summary, files, tasks, validations, and acceptance criteria.
Checks git branch/status and protects unrelated user work before editing.
Runs per-task validation and fixes or reports failures before moving to the next task.
Writes or instructs creation of a .codex/prps/reports/*.implementation.md report.
Records deviations from the original plan and final validation results.
